scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:all
scripts.install:all: cd front-end/pab-dashboard && npm ci && cd ../user-audio && npm ci && cd ../..
scripts.build:all: npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:user && npm run merge
scripts.build:dashboard: cd front-end/pab-dashboard && npm run build && cd ../..
scripts.build:user: cd front-end/user-audio && REACT_APP_API_URL=/api/audio npm run build && cd ../..
scripts.merge: mkdir -p front-end/pab-dashboard/dist/static && cp -r front-end/user-audio/build/static/. front-end/pab-dashboard/dist/static/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp front-end/user-audio/build/index.html front-end/pab-dashboard/dist/user.html
